{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030614D9A5975DA92102B2DA24"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618788130646541080","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一部很优秀的知青下乡作品。
男主是个官二代，多才多艺，长得帅，但性格软弱。被父亲连累被迫下乡当了知青。
此前，男主有一个热恋他的姑娘，下乡后，男主又遇到一个姑娘，于是曲折复杂的情节开始发展…","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":6,"text":"知青下乡","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9F%A5%E9%9D%92%E4%B8%8B%E4%B9%A1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420637402B2DA24%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227618788130646541080%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227616272985623628862%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9F%A5%E9%9D%92%E4%B8%8B%E4%B9%A1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773892070,"group_id":"7616272985623628862","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+4yzR8wbJ1BfUWSiCXESKw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"87964180240","user_name":"琅琊山脉的殷白鹤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"87964180240","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7616272985623628862","book_info":{"abstract":"【知情+乡村+年代+情感+极限拉扯+政治运动】特殊年代里，一个干部子弟的情感困局。岁月流转，蓦然回首，才知最在乎自己的人就在眼前。
冷东雪的父亲冷管权是一个老革命，建国后历任多职，后来担任县长。这时候的冷东雪顺风顺水、生活优渥。大革命发生，冷管权受到冲击，两年后亡故。十六七岁的冷东雪也坠入尘埃，被下放到家乡冷家屯。
冷东雪的高中同学谢静雅，一直热恋着他。等到冷东雪被下放，谢静雅不顾父母反对前来追随。突遭变故使冷东雪内心封闭、性情大变，带着忧郁与谢静雅成婚，却始终无法接受这段无爱的婚姻。
与此同时，冷东雪与公社宣传队的李红梅暗生情愫，发生越界之恋。优柔寡断的性格让他迟迟无法决断这段关系，终致李红梅离去，转而与他的好朋友冷东坡相恋。冷东坡因为创作小说失败陷入崩溃，转而沉迷易学，变得神神叨叨，令李红梅再度失望。
岁月流转，冷东雪找到父亲被冤枉的证据，母亲也进城为此奔波。政策落实后，他回城成为工人，谢静雅也因顶替父亲上岗而回城。谢静雅的同学吴大帅，当年曾经苦苦追求她，这时两人成为同事，仍然痴心不改。尽管生活条件改观，冷东雪与谢静雅的关系依旧冰冷。蓦然回首，谢静雅才发现最在乎自己的人就在眼前……
本书以特殊年代为背景，讲述干部子弟冷东雪的命运沉浮与情感困局。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/291a8d16ca11088e810aa0324b9d5168~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刘天鹏","author_id":"","book_id":"7616272985623628862","book_name":"乡村迷情","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#103050","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"9人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":400,"name":"现实小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=400&name=现实小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7616283336549338174","read_count":"9","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"208786"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"66","tags":"精品小说,现实小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/291a8d16ca11088e810aa0324b9d5168~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390374&x-signature=C66vh7CN%2Bt7kdibpAhkIYoUBUSw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"32"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030614D9A5975DA92102B2DA24"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3634,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7616272985623628862","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":"
